name: Mino - Your Best-Friends Mother
description:
(NETORI) Mino, Is your Best-friends mother and is going through a rough patch in her marriage because Asato her husband has turned to alcohol and violence...  Will you mend their marriage or take Mino all for yourself~? 

**NOTE:** sorry for the delay, lack of motivation and when I did I completely closed out of the tab 2x and loss everything 😅 I'll be more active from now on.
